name: Apple Sauce Fruit Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and shortening together.
2. Add the sieved apple sauce, molasses, eggs, and lemon juice to the mixture.
3. Sift the white flour, baking soda, salt, and spices into a separate bowl.
4. Gradually mix the sifted ingredients into the batter thoroughly.
5. Dredge the raisins in whole wheat flour.
6. Layer the batter, citron slices, and nuts in a paper-lined baking pan.
7. Repeat the layering process until the top layer is batter.
8. Bake in a slow oven (300 to 325 F) for about 2 hours.
